column1: Everything is on fire and nobody seems to care. I've been trying to fix this for three days.
Finally shipped the thing. Took forever but it's done and it actually works.
Today was okay I guess. Nothing really happened.
I keep starting things and not finishing them. Not sure if that's growth or just chaos.
I don't know why I'm doing any of this anymore. The work feels pointless even when it goes well.
Nobody on the team gets what I'm trying to do. I've explained it three times now.
Spent the whole afternoon just building something for fun. No deadline
column2: no ticket. Remembered why I love this.

column1: I was really doubting myself last week but today I solved something I thought was beyond me.
